title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: lightweight, extensible framework for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally via a single CLI/API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage local models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Clean open-source ChatGPT-style web UI that talks to your local Ollama instance; no data leaves your machine.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Conversational TUI for Ollama written in Go; supports chat history, model switching and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; async & sync APIs, streaming, embeddings, tools, Maven Central.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma; ingest PDFs and chat with them locally.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model through slash commands.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for offline LLM tests.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client with async enumerable streaming, dependency-injection friendly, NuGet package.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama chat & embed endpoints so any MCP client can call them.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate for Ollama; tokio-based, strongly typed requests/responses, crates.io published.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake that builds Ollama from source with CUDA and ROCm variants; merged into nixpkgs.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an „Ollama“ command to summarize notes or generate text using a local model.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that listens in channels/DMs and responds via Ollama; deploy to Render in one click.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve example showing how to horizontally scale Ollama models across a GPU cluster.
